Introduction
    The soul of the Hero-King Inglis is reborn as a noble maiden banned from chivalry. Defiantly, he forges his warrior path, mastering the sword and proving his worth with bloodshed.

Also known as: The Hero King, Reincarnated to Master Martial Arts-Thus Becoming the World's Strongest Female Knight-in-Training
